item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Eh. Novote for now - although it is technically well-done, I feel like the plot was obscured by the heavy morphology focus.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I like it! Sarkic planet, uranus, errected, all great stuff. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Simple, weird, mysterious, left me asking questions. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
In my eyes, it would make sense if Gobatti had a team he would trust while still working for the Foundation.

That and it would be better if Gobatti kept an eye on his teammates AND make it seem normal to NASA at large, otherwise people would ask questions about why Gobatti is working with an entirely different team after a routine job of looking at the stars.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: If Dr. Gobatti was employed by the Foundation, how did he continue working with the amnesticized NASA team?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The thought about an entire planet made out of god damn human flesh does hook me in, honestly. The note at the end about several unknown people roaming about the site carving stuff that possibly worships Sarkicism brought about a slightly unsettling sensation within me (in a good way). +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Very interesting how you incorporated different elements of the human body and corresponded them to the planet. Dirt on the planet's outer layer made of skin cells matching that of skin is definitely clever with making the reader think about what other similarities it shares with biological beings. Such as, the possibility of this SCP being maybe capable of reproduction. Definitely a nice short and sweet Skip about more about the SCP's possibilities than just something weird about it.
+1

item.title: First SCP! Not an SPC!
item.content:encoded:
Hello reader!

I'm very excited (and very anxious) about posting this. Flesh World! If the Sarkics were an intergalactic species and not humans, this would be the result.

I wanna give a massive thank you to torcsandantlers, MalyceGraves, and Cyvstvi (All on IRC chat) who helped me make this.

Also I think I should apologise if you didn't like it. I just wanted to take the plunge and test the waters. So uh… Sorry!
